title: Green HUD Overlay
body:
# Michaelninder's Green HUD Overlay
## Version: Minecraft 1.8
_Add a fresh, dynamic look to your Minecraft HUD with Michaelninder's Green HUD Overlay!_

This pack brings bold, green highlights to essential HUD elements, designed for players who want to stand out. Ideal for PvP and competitive gameplay, the vibrant green visuals make tracking health, armor, and hotbar selection quick and easy.

### Features:
- Green Health Hearts: A bold green twist on classic hearts for clear and stylish health tracking.
- Green Armor Bars: Sleek green armor icons that are easily visible, even in high-intensity fights.
- Enhanced Hotbar Selector: Custom green selector for smooth inventory swaps and quick active-slot identification.
- Simple Overlay: Crafted to complement, not overwhelm—use it alongside your favorite texture packs for a subtle, clean overlay.
### Preview
See Michaelninder’s Green HUD Overlay in action!


![HotBar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4aaddf202d149e8a07d9c7f8a5dbd895d5f963cc.png)

### Compatibility
Designed as an overlay for Minecraft 1.8.9, this pack layers perfectly over other texture packs, so you can enjoy the custom green HUD without changing your main textures.

Instructions:
Simply load it up, enable it as an overlay, and bring Michaelninder's green style to your game!
